articles.title: Litecoin Lights Up Twitter With Verified Blue Tick Badge
articles.description: Litecoin was recently verified by Twitter with a blue tick badge on their account. They also posted a tweet to celebrate the occasion. articles.title: Kim Kardashain Promotes Crypto Scam, Big Hack In Play?
articles.description: Popular socialite Kim Kardashian has been promoting a shady project via her social networks. Called Ethereum MAX or ETHMAX protocol, Kardashian uploaded two Instagram stories in the past 24 hours asking their fans if they are “into crypto”. articles.title: Crypto wallet app Ledger Live integrates its first DeFi platform, ParaSwap
articles.description: Crypto hardware wallet maker Ledger has integrated the first decentralized finance (DeFi) platform — ParaSwap — into its app called Ledger Live.

articles.title: Thai regulators ban exchanges from trading meme tokens and NFTs
articles.description: The Thai Securities and Exchange Commission enacted the ban on Friday, giving exchanges one month to comply with the new regulation.
